title: Dexam Soft Grip Oval Grater with Non-Slip Base, Silver 15 cm
features: Small stainless steel oval grater with a comfortable soft grip handle

description: From the manufacturer Dexam 15 cm/ 6-inch Soft Grip Oval Grater with Non-slip Base, Silver Small stainless steel oval grater with a comfortable soft grip handle and non-slip rubber base. Coarse, fine and nutmeg/zest grating faces. The compact oval shape takes less storage space than a traditional box grater. About us At Dexam, we're passionate about food. And that means we're passionate about the tools a cook needs to make delicious food. We offer an unparalleled choice of innovative and functional kitchenware that not only looks great and sells well, but is exceptional value for money. We source from all around the globe to bring the very best ideas to you quickly. We strive to be your one-stop shop for all cooking needs. Since 1957, Dexam has produced and distributed high quality kitchenware and we're proud of it!
